Device pairing

AI Memory is accessible at https://brain.arunp.in via the Cloudflare tunnel. Pair Android with a short-lived code, or use the advanced token flow for the Chrome extension.

THIS DEVICE

Already paired through your unlocked browser session.

ADD ANDROID DEVICE
Android app

Generate a temporary code, then enter it in Android setup.

Add Android device
ADVANCED TOKEN SETUP
Install the AI Memory extension (see extension/README.md for sideload steps).
Open chrome://extensions, find AI Memory, click Details → Extension options.
Set AI Memory URL to https://brain.arunp.in and copy the token from advanced setup into the Token field.
Click Test connection, then Save.
Show advanced token setup
